mindsetPackages.name: Winning Fans
mindsetPackages.description: Reach fans while their team is ahead or coming off a win — peak optimism and buying intent.

mindsetPackages.name: Losing Fans
mindsetPackages.description: Reach loyal fans when their team is down or just lost — moments of consolation and resilience.

mindsetPackages.name: High Intensity
mindsetPackages.description: Reach fans during big plays, close games, and overtime — when attention is at its absolute peak.

mindsetPackages.name: Low Intensity
mindsetPackages.description: Reach fans during lulls and blowouts — opportunity to have captive second screen viewing or offer comfort offers
